title: Metallic Bone can be destroyed by opponent roll 1-3

card.rawText: The equipped creature cannot receive damage. During your opponent's turn they may roll 1 die. If the result is 1-3, this card is destroyed.

plan.title: Metallic Bone can be destroyed by opponent roll 1-3
plan.summary: During opponent turn, force a successful 1-3 roll and verify Metallic Bone destroys itself.

notes: Pre-place Metallic Bone on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
During opponent turn they may roll 1 die; 1-3 destroys this card.

steps: Opponent chooses the Metallic Bone destroy roll.

expectedAssertions.label: Metallic Bone leaves player_1 magic slots

manualVerification: Verify against card text: The equipped creature cannot receive damage. During your opponent's turn they may roll 1 die. If the result is 1-3, this card is destroyed.
riskNotes: A red result marks missing opponent-turn destroy-self runtime support.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_073_metallic_bone-073-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
